spec_match.rationale: Provides a great platform metrics explorer reflecting Web Serial's parity, dataBits, stopBits, and flowControl parameters, illustrating the connection lifecycle.

interactive.rationale: Includes interactive controls to change parity/stop bits and dynamically recompute expected throughput and latencies, along with a clickable interactive state machine.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Corresponds well with the index page blurb, exploring open options, throughput, and latency.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles computations for buffer fill times and shows typical uses for each baud rate.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required https://chromestatus.com/feature/5139978918821888 self-heal reference link.

design_system.rationale: Conforms with the design system CSS and styles.

summary: The previous reference-only critique has been resolved: the concept page now carries the canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link required by the repository rules.
